title: nasturtium × gerardii
intro: Nasturtium × gerardii, also known as Garden Cress or Indian Cress, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family and is a hybrid of Nasturtium officinale and Rorippa islandica. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects, which make it useful in treating various health conditions such as digestive issues, skin irritations, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Nasturtium × gerardii include its ability to stimulate the appetite, aid in digestion, and provide relief from colds and flu. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and it is also used as a garnish or edible addition to salads due to its peppery flavor.
